author: misilva73
content: <@412614104222531604> , a topic raised in this breakout was to move all future discussions re repricings to ACDT. With 8037 more stable, we don't need a dedicated breakout anymore. Would that be ok?

author: barnabasbusa
content: I think as long as the discussion won’t be just an hour long detailed conversation then it’s ok to move to acdt

author: danceratopz
content:
Agree with Barnabas!

Please add your topics as a comment and we can update the agenda https://github.com/ethereum/pm/issues/2085

author: misilva73
content: Yes, I expect the discussion to be shorter now. Also, a lot of discussions are being done async atm anyways
